chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 320 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.1801/2025 2. For orders on office objection No.10 & 11 3. For orders on Misc. No.1580/2025 4. For orders on Misc. No.1581/2025 5. For hearing of main case 28.01.2025 Messrs. Mehmood Farooq Channa and Atta Hussain, advocates for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-5. An order prima facie appealable under the statutory hierarchy of the Customs Act, 1969, has been assailed before this Court without justification. Learned counsel remained unable to assist as to how in presence of statutory remedy writ petition can be entertained. Petition is dismissed in limine along with pending application/s. Judge Judge Amjad
